title: Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners:
Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners!
